zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter Blount於大約1270年出生時，他的父親Sir William Blount38歲，母親Isabel Beauchamp37歲。他於1294年之前與Johanna Soddington在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1322年在英國英格蘭享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter Blount于大约1270年出生时，他的父亲Sir William Blount38岁，母亲Isabel Beauchamp37岁。他于1294年之前与Johanna Soddington在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1322年在英国英格兰享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Blount
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Blunt
meanings: English: nickname for someone with fair hair or a light complexion, from Old French blund, blond (from Latin blondus) ‘blond, fair, yellow-haired’, used also of complexion.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Walter Blount was born about 1270, his father, Sir William Blount, was 38 and his mother, Isabel Beauchamp, was 37. He married Johanna Soddington before 1294, in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1322, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter Blount est né environ 1270, son père, Sir William Blount, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Isabel Beauchamp, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Johanna Soddington avant 1294, à Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1322, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter Blount um 1270 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Blount 38 und seine Mutter Isabel Beauchamp 37. Er hat vor 1294 in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom Johanna Soddington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1322 im Alter von 53 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Blount è nato il circa 1270, il suo padre, Sir William Blount, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Beauchamp, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Johanna Soddington prima del 1294, nel Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1322, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter Blountが約1270年に生まれた時，父Sir William Blountは38歳，母Isabel Beauchampは37歳であった。1294年以前にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアでJohanna Soddingtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1322年にイギリスイギリスで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter Blount(이)가 대략 1270년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Blount(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Beauchamp(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1294년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르에서 Johanna Soddington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1322년 영국 잉글랜드에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Blount nasceu aproximadamente 1270, seu pai, Sir William Blount, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Beauchamp, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Johanna Soddington antes 1294, em Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1322, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter Blount родился около 1270 г., его отцу по имени Sir William Blount было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Beauchamp, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Johanna Soddington перед 1294 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1322 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Walter Blount nació aproximadamente 1270, su papá, Sir William Blount, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Isabel Beauchamp, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Johanna Soddington antes de 1294, en Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1322, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 53 años.
